title: EclipseCraft
description: Bringing Berserk To Minecraft to the best of my ability.
body:
Welcome to EclipseCraft, a Minecraft mod inspired by the dark fantasy world of Berserk. Immerse yourself in the grim atmosphere of this legendary manga and anime series as you wield the iconic Dragonslayer sword, the weapon of the legendary Black Swordsman, Guts.

In EclipseCraft, you'll step into a world filled with demons, dark magic, and epic battles. Currently featuring the mighty Dragonslayer, prepare to unleash its devastating power against your foes as you venture through the landscapes reminiscent of Berserk's hauntingly beautiful settings.

Stay tuned for future updates as we expand the mod with new content, including terrifying mobs inspired by the creatures and characters from Berserk. Experience the struggle for survival and the relentless pursuit of vengeance in EclipseCraft.

![fh](https://i.imgur.com/sQrJK7P.png)

Make sure to join my [website](https://voidlessmedia.wordpress.com/) for more info on mod development including a modpack featuring this mod and many more. 

Want to support mod development? Check our our BuyMeACoffee or Patreon. Every donation is extremly appriciated.
